case_title: PERFECTO JIRELLE OBISPO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: OBJECTION TO COURT COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE AT TRIAL PER LR 6.1(C) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
